seoTitle: Inglehope vs Inkpen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Inglehope and Inkpen. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Inglehope and Inkpen.
heading: Inglehope vs Inkpen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Inglehope, Western Australia and Inkpen, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Inglehope has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Inkpen (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Inglehope or Inkpen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Inglehope has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Inkpen scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Inglehope scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Inkpen scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Inglehope or Inkpen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Inglehope has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
